title: Patients
name: Name
confirmInactivationMessage: Are you sure you want to inactivate this patient?
deleteConfirmTitle: Are you sure you want to delete this patient?
deleteConfirmDescription: This action cannot be undone. This will delete the patient and all scheduled appointments.
saveError: Error saving patient. Please try again.
fillRequiredFields: Please fill in all required fields.
completeAllSteps: Please complete all steps before saving.

responsible.title: Guardian / Companion
responsible.informResponsibleDescription: Check this option if you want to register guardian or companion information.

access.createAccount: Create access account for the patient
access.createAccountDescription: Check this option if you want to create a login account for the patient.

username.title: Username
username.description: Set a unique username for patient login. You can customize or generate automatically.
username.label: Username
username.placeholder: Enter a username (e.g. john.doe) or use the generated one
username.formDescription: This username will be used along with the password to log in. You can customize or generate automatically.
username.editDescription: This username will be used along with the password to log in.

email.title: Access Account
email.description: A login account will be created for the patient using the email provided in the personal data tab.
email.editDescription: The patient's email will be used for login.
email.label: Email for access
email.formDescription: This email will be synchronized with the email provided in the personal data tab.
email.editFormDescription: This email will be used to log in.

password.label: Password
password.placeholder: Click generate or enter a password
password.editPlaceholder: Leave blank to keep current password
password.description: The password will be automatically generated (8 alphanumeric characters) if left blank.
password.editDescription: Enter a new password to change or leave blank to keep the current one.

access.editAccessType: You can change the login type between username and email.
access.editUsernameDescription: Set a unique username for patient login.

validation.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 6 characters.
validation.accompaniantNameRequired: Companion name is required for patients under 18 years old.
validation.accompaniantRelationshipRequired: Companion relationship is required for patients under 18 years old.
